title: asplenium listeri
intro: Asplenium listeri, also known as the List's spleenwort, is a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asplenium listeri are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used in teas, capsules, or topical creams.
